notes: Goal review: strong drone/elevated coverage. Photo 6 is best top-down/near-overhead showing house, patio/backyard and treed lot context; photo 4 also shows house/yard; photo 5 gives wider setting.
Goal review: no clear aerial/top-down images. Best available are ground-level exterior/yard views: photos 3 and 4 show house with lawn/lot context; photos 1-2 show front exterior.
Goal review: no aerial or top-down lot view. Only ground-level exterior/patio/yard images; photo 1 best shows house with surrounding yard, photo 2 side/drive area, photos 5-6 patio/yard context.

Goal review: no true aerial/top-down house+lot view. Strong ground-level yard/lot coverage with house visible in photos 2, 3, 6; photos 13/15/24 are elevated/deck-style views but mostly yard/lake rather than full house+backyard together.
Goal review: no aerial/top-down or backyard/lot overview apparent. Only useful exterior context is photo 1 front elevation; remaining images are interiors or views through windows.
Goal review: no aerial/top-down/elevated property views visible. Only useful exterior is front/yard view photo 1; backyard/lot not shown together.

Goal review: no true aerial. Several ground-level rear/yard views show house with backyard/deck; photo 25 appears elevated from deck/balcony over yard but does not clearly show whole house and lot together.
Goal review: photo 4 is an elevated/scenic area view, not clearly the property. Property photos are mostly ground-level exterior/front/rear; photo 5 shows rear deck/house but limited lot context.
Goal review: no aerial/top-down/elevated views. Multiple ground-level exterior views show rear/side yard and house together, especially photos 8-12.
Goal review: no aerial/top-down/elevated views. Wide ground-level exterior shots show house, detached garage, yard/lot, and treed surroundings; photos 3 and 6 are strongest.
